payload.answer: I’m not sure who “he” refers to or what “the other one” means. Please clarify before I can suggest how to handle this memory.
repair_options: Specify who “he” refers to and what item or option “the other one” refers to.
If this is a preference to remember, restate it with explicit names, e.g., “[Person] prefers [specific option].”
If this updates an earlier preference, provide the earlier preference and the new preferred option so it can be reviewed as a possible replacement.
If this is only a temporary/contextual preference, clarify the context or say not to save it.
